mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, notice_title, notice_type, publish_scope, publish_status, published_at, expired_at, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from sys_notice
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from sys_notice
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_notice (id, tenant_id, notice_title, notice_type, publish_scope, publish_status, published_at, expired_at, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, notice_content ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{noticeTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{noticeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publishScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publishStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expiredAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{noticeContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )

insert into sys_notice
id,
tenant_id,
notice_title,
notice_type,
publish_scope,
publish_status,
published_at,
expired_at,
version,
delete_marker,
create_by,
create_time,
update_by,
update_time,
notice_content,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{noticeTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{noticeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{publishScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update sys_notice
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_id = #{record.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
notice_title = #{record.noticeTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
notice_type = #{record.noticeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
publish_scope = #{record.publishScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
publish_status = #{record.publishStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
published_at = #{record.publishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expired_at = #{record.expiredAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{record.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
notice_content = #{record.noticeContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update sys_notice set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{record.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, notice_title = #{record.noticeTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notice_type = #{record.noticeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_scope = #{record.publishScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_status = #{record.publishStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, published_at = #{record.publishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, expired_at = #{record.expiredAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{record.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, notice_content = #{record.noticeContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update sys_notice set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{record.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, notice_title = #{record.noticeTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notice_type = #{record.noticeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_scope = #{record.publishScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_status = #{record.publishStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, published_at = #{record.publishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, expired_at = #{record.expiredAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{record.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update sys_notice
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
notice_title = #{noticeTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
notice_type = #{noticeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
publish_scope = #{publishScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
publish_status = #{publishStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
published_at = #{publishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expired_at = #{expiredAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
notice_content = #{noticeContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
